titleStmt.title: SII 24.522: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 522. (A.R. No. 16 of 1936-37.) III PRĀKĀRA, KITCHEN BASE

summary.p: Registers a gift of money by Paramēśvaran, son of Maṅgā-śeṭṭi a merchant of Śrīraṅgam, for offerings to the god, when halting at the Viṭṭhalarājan-maṇḍapa in the Sāḷuvanāyakaṉ-tōppu, when the deity is taken in procession to Uṟaiyūr on the 5th and the 6th days of the Brahmōtsava festival. The details of date viz., Śaka 1533 Virōdhikṛit, Siṁha, ba. 13, Tuesday, Pūram, regularly correspond to A.D. 1611, January 20, Tuesday, ba. 15 (not 13), ·55; ·58.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvaran śrīvirapradāpa śrīviraveṅkaṭapati devamahārāyar pṛdvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakāpdam 1000 5 100 3 10 3 Itaṉmeṟc cellāniṉṟa virotikiṟit samvassarattu śiṅkanāyaṟṟu Abharapa kṣattu traiyodeśiyum maṅkaḷavāramum peṟṟa pūranakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇḍiyakulāśanivaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkan tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganādhaṉ śrībhaṇṭārattukku Ittiruppati viyāpāric ceṭṭiyaḷil maṇṭapamuṭaiya maṅkāceṭṭi makaṉ
paramecuraṉeṉ deṇḍan samaṟpittu poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi . Aṭiyeṉuṭaiya Ubhaiyamāka Ātibrahmāviṉ tiruṉāḷ Añcāntiruṉāḷ Āṟāntiruṉāḷ Uṟaiyūṟku Eḻuntaruḷukaiyil nāḷ Iraṇṭukku cāḷuva nāyakkar toppil viṭṭalarācāviṉ maṇṭapattukku Etukka pātai veṭṭayil Amutu ceytaruḷum cemattaḷikai tocaippaṭi vaṭaippaṭikku poliyūṭṭukku perumāḷ śrībhaṇṭārattil Inta varuṣam Āṭi mātam 10 5 § mutaliṭṭa kuṅkumappūvilai poṉ 5 10 Inta
ppoṉ Aṉpatukkum mātam Oṉṟukku vaṭṭi nūṟṟukku paṇam Oṉṟekālāka varuṣam Oṉṟukku vaṭṭiyil kūṭṭiṇa poṉ 7 U 5 Intappoṉ Eḻum paṇam Añcukkum cilavāka Ātibramāviṉ tirunāḷ Añcāntiruṉāḷ Āṟān tiruṉāḷ nāḷ Iraṇṭukkum Amutu ceytaruḷum cemattaḷikai 4 kku poṉ 3 pu 2 tocaippaṭi 4 kku poṉ 2 pu 8 vakaip paṭi 2 kku poṉ 1 pu 4 tirumuṉkāṇi U 1 Āka poṉ 7 pu 5 Intappaṭi varuṣam Oṉṟukku Eḻu poṉṉum paṇam Añcukkum varuṣam varuṣam toṟum Amutu ceytaṟuḷi Itukku varum viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu Uṇṭānatu
Aṭiyeṉe peṟṟuvarakkaṭaveṉāka Ippaṭikku Intakkayikkukiriyam Ācantrārkkasthāyiāy putrapautraparamparaiyāy naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum Intappaṭi poliyūṭṭu śilāsāsanam Eḻutinamaikku kovilkkaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu §
1. There is a figure between and
Digital edition of SII 24.522 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
